description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build sakura that runs on push and pull request events for master, feature/*, and release/* branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have a single job called build that runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release configurations across Win32 and x64 platforms. The job should check out the code, set up MSBuild, build the solution using build-sln.bat, and upload the resulting zip artifacts.
